strengths: Current role at re:cinq directly matches core stack (TypeScript, Node.js) and includes AI agent infrastructure and MCP framework development — a rare and explicitly required skill
15+ years of polyglot full-stack engineering with consistent seniority progression across backend, frontend, mobile, and embedded systems
Deep TDD culture: created testing libraries (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), ran testing workshops, applied TDD/pairing/CI as core practices across multiple roles
concerns: Nest.js, Vitest, and Playwright are absent from the resume despite being primary stack and testing framework requirements
No Kotlin experience listed anywhere — the secondary backend language requirement is unmet
Python is missing from skills and employment history despite being listed as a required language in the multi-language proficiency section
response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned senior full-stack engineer whose current role at re:cinq directly aligns with the core stack (TypeScript, Node.js) and uniquely satisfies the AI agent development requirement through hands-on MCP infrastructure work. His long track record of TDD advocacy, polyglot adaptability, and cloud/containerization experience (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker) are strong signals for the role. The notable gaps — Nest.js as the primary backend framework, Kotlin for secondary services, and Python as a required language — are real but represent learnable extensions for an engineer of his caliber; they warrant direct verification in a technical screen rather than disqualification.
